title: Escape from Impel Down: Turning Point
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #12, Blackbeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #18, Whitebeard, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Unknown person #12, Blackbeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #18, Whitebeard, focusing on the immediate stakes of escape from impel down: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: You really are a fearsome man!!!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: No no, wait!! That's all true, but...

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Really, I was just in training ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Captain Buggy!! We'll stick with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We've got Captain Buggy on our side!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That's right, I can do it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I feel like I can do it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Be quiet, you bunch of morons !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: And touch the Pinnacle of this world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Come with me and chase my dream....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Today... I'll take white- beard's head...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And with it, the whole world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Who needs a boring life of peace!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: That's right!!! Here we go, men !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Captain Buggy!! You're the world's leader!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: gyahahaha!! I'll hold you to that!

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Unknown person #12, Blackbeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #18, Whitebeard, focusing on the immediate stakes of escape from impel down: turning point.
